summary: Comprehensive testing of Dishu Studio photography website MVP completed successfully. All core features working including intro animation, navigation, booking form, admin dashboard, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Intro animation displays and completes properly
Navigation between all pages (Home, About, Services, Contact)
Services dropdown shows Wedding/Baby shoot options
Hero Book Now button navigates to contact page
Featured services cards are clickable and navigate correctly
Admin login works with credentials admin/admin123
Admin dashboard shows bookings and stats
Admin service and status filters work
Mobile menu opens and closes properly
